name: Laboratory measurements of Magallana hongkongensis and seawater carbonate chemistry in Zhanjiang, June 2016
description: Laboratory dataset containing physical and chemical properties of the mollusk Magallana hongkongensis and associated seawater carbonate chemistry parameters. The data includes treatment conditions, organism metrics (area porosity), and extensive seawater parameters such as pH, temperature, salinity, alkalinity, partial pressure of CO2, carbonate ion concentration, saturation states for calcite and aragonite, and dissolved inorganic carbon. Measurements were conducted at a single location in Zhanjiang, China, on June 1, 2016.
